name: Coney Island Hot Dog Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 ounce can (1 cup) seasoned tomato sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add water and chopped onion, cook until onions are softened.
3. Stir in minced garlic and season with chili powder and salt.
4. Pour in the seasoned tomato sauce and bring to a simmer.
5. Cook uncovered for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Serves: 12 dogs
